English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cartoon art collection 8030
30 cubic feet. 30 cubic feet.
1926-1988. Extent is approximate. Artwork, proofs, and releases. Original illustrations and prepress proofs of cartoon art. Comic strips represented include the Berrys, Bi-focals, the Bungle Family, Cicero's Cat, the Flintstones, Grafitti, Gunther, Heathcliff, the Jackson Twins, Joe Palooka, Mickey Finn, Mutt and Jeff, Sal A. Mander, Sparky Watts, Stoker, This Funny World, and Yogi Bear. Also includes releases compiled by McNaught Syndicate. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 81 ======= 81 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 8241498
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
November 2017
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, November 2017
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, May 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Original illustrations and prepress proofs of cartoon art. Comic strips represented include the Berrys, Bi-focals, the Bungle Family, Cicero's Cat, the Flintstones, Grafitti, Gunther, Heathcliff, the Jackson Twins, Joe Palooka, Mickey Finn, Mutt and Jeff, Sal A. Mander, Sparky Watts, Stoker, This Funny World, and Yogi Bear. Also includes releases compiled by McNaught Syndicate.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Cartoon Art, Prints, and Releases
Subseries Ia. The Berrys by Carl Grubert
Subseries Ib. Bi-Focals by Ruth Marcus
Subseries Ic. The Bungle Family by HJ Tuthill
Subseries Id. Cicero's Cat by Al Smith
Subseries Ie. Dixie Dugan by McEvoy and Striebel
Subseries If. The Flintstones by Hanna-Barbera
Subseries Ig. Graffiti by Bill Leary
Subseries Ih. Gunther by John Roman
Subseries Ii. Heathcliff by George Gately
Subseries Ij. The Jackson Twins by Dick Brooks
Subseries Ik. Joe Palooka by Tony DiPreta
Subseries Il. Mickey Finn by MS Weiss
Subseries Im. Mutt and Jeff by Al Smith
Subseries Im. Mutt and Jeff by Al Smith
Subseries In. Red Ryder by Fred Harman
Subseries Io. Sal A. Mander by Fred Harman
Subseries Ip. Sparky Watts by Boody Rogers
Subseries Iq. Stoker by Henry Boltinoff
Subseries Ir. This Funny World by various artists, listed alphabetically
Subseries Is. Yogi Bear by Hanna-Barbera
Subseries It. Miscellaneous comics
Series II. Political Cartoons
Series III. Miscellaneous Promotional Materials
Series IV. McNaught Files
Cite As:
Cartoon art collection, #8030. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

5 original drawings. Original drawings of Sparky Watts by Boody Rogers, 5 pages of what may either be an issue of Sparky Watts or a segment of Sparky Watts in Big Shot Comics. There is no date, but it was found in a box of proofs from the mid-1940s.
